note: AI 2.0 queue — each pick is a same-match COMBO of auto-settleable real-odds markets (goals + result/BTTS) that multiply to ~2.0. Odds are realistic Bet-Builder estimates. Corners/cards/shots aren't in our free data feeds, so they can't be auto-settled and are not used here.
